channel.title: shaunadewit
channel.description: OK Boomer, all the latest TikToks from shaunadewit

item.title: Talking about sexism doesn’t always get attention. So I thought… what if I stop fighting it, and start agreeing with it instead? Maybe then they’ll finally hear how it actually sounds. #core #mentality #comedу #viral #humor
item.description: Talking about sexism doesn’t always get attention. So I thought… what if I stop fighting it, and start agreeing with it instead? Maybe then they’ll finally hear how it actually sounds. #core #mentality #comedу #viral #humor

item.title: Advertising @febelfinbelgium | If you need (psychological) support following these events, contact the police; they will direct you to the appropriate services. #scam #fraud #goviral #comedy #humor
